## ✨ What would you like to see?

Describe your idea in a few words.

## 🎬 How would it help?

Tell us how this feature could improve your Frame By Plane workflow.

## 💡 How could it work?

Optional: describe how you imagine the feature, its controls or where it could appear in the interface.

## 📎 References

Optional screenshots, mockups, videos or examples from other software are welcome. 🙂
